description: User who writes about work stress and asks about recent challenges

memory_chunks.content: Deadline crunch this week. Three PRs to review, two features to ship, and the PM keeps adding scope. I'm barely keeping my head above water.
Had a difficult conversation with my manager today about workload. She acknowledged that the team is stretched thin but couldn't give me concrete relief. Frustrating.
Couldn't sleep last night thinking about the product launch. So much could go wrong. I keep running worst-case scenarios in my head.
Finally shipped the feature. It went live without any incidents. Feeling relieved but already dreading the next sprint planning.

query: What work challenges have I been dealing with recently?
